title: COLLINS PURPLE
description:
This gives a smooth texture to blocks in your world or a server!
This resource pack can also be used as PVP pack.
Please support me by downloading this pack!

ENJOY!.
body: ![COLLINS PURPLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/846448fe1b92e8e25d7dac4890376de5acb1832d.png) The **Collins Purple** resource pack is a smooth resource pack for Minecraft that aims to give the game a more polished look. It features 16x resolution textures that are clean and crisp, without being too realistic. The pack also includes a variety of customization options, so you can tailor it to your own preferences. Here are some of the features of the Collins resource pack: - 16x resolution textures - Clean and crisp graphics If you are looking for a resource pack that will give Minecraft a more polished look, then the Collins resource pack is a great option. It is free to download and use, and it is compatible with all versions of Minecraft Java Edition. ![collins 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60d4bb5d333128236f3fa49188f6093ffc262b24.webp) Here are some additional details about the Collins resource pack: - The pack was created by a person of experienced Minecraft creators and texture artists. - The pack is constantly being updated with new features and improvements. - The pack is available to download for free and you are allowed to use this pack on your server and distribute and do anything you want with this. : ] /locate button download /give hugs @a
